design_plan: rng_seed=42; AIDA pass; hero_line_width≈1120px→2.4 lines; bento density validated via grid-auto-flow:dense; all competitors label-swept; CTA contrast checked (ink/white pills); CSS length>4200 chars; ambient layers fixed; animations GSAP-guarded
headline: Super for recruiters sourcing candidates and coordinating interviews

site_brief.audience: recruiters sourcing candidates and coordinating interviews
site_brief.goal: Create a conversion-focused landing page for this audience. Tie current market evidence to pain points, then show how Super can operate apps and reuse a computer-use cache for repeated work.
queries: recruiters sourcing candidates and coordinating interviews AI assistant
recruiters sourcing candidates and coordinating interviews personal AI agent
site_brief.title: Super for recruiters sourcing candidates and coordinating interviews

summary: A conversion‑focused niche landing page for recruiters who live inside LinkedIn, ATSs, calendars, and email. This page shows how Super’s personal AI agents can operate real software, reuse a computer‑use cache for repeated sourcing and scheduling work, and avoid the brittle automation and security pitfalls increasingly reported across the agent market.
